<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="zh-CN"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <title>获取数据</title> <style> body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; max-width: 900px; margin: 40px auto; padding: 20px; background: #0a0a1c; color: #fff; } h1 { color: #60a5fa; margin-bottom: 20px; } .btn { background: #22c55e; color: white; border: none; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; margin: 10px 0; } .btn:hover { background: #16a34a; } .status { padding: 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 8px; margin: 16px 0; } textarea { width: 100%; height: 400px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #fff; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; margin-top: 20px; } .success { color: #22c55e; } .warning { color: #fbbf24; } </style> </head> <body> <h1>📋 获取您的数据</h1> <div class="status"> <p class="warning">请按以下步骤操作：</p> <ol> <li>首先打开您的应用页面（localhost），确保这是您添加了数据的那个页面</li> <li>然后在同一个浏览器中打开这个页面</li> <li>点击下面的按钮获取数据</li> </ol> </div> <button class="btn" id="getDataBtn">🔍 获取并复制数据</button> <div class="status" id="status"> <p>等待操作...</p> </div> <textarea id="dataArea" placeholder="数据将显示在这里..."></textarea> <script> const STORAGE_KEY = 'talent-showcase-local-data'; document.getElementById('getDataBtn').addEventListener('click', function() { try { const data = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY); if (data) { const parsed = JSON.parse(data); document.getElementById('dataArea').value = JSON.stringify(parsed, null, 2); document.getElementById('status').innerHTML = ` <div class="success"> ✅ 数据获取成功！<br><br> 📚 书籍: ${parsed.books?.length || 0} 本<br> 📝 文章: ${parsed.articles?.length || 0} 篇<br> 🏋️ 训练: ${parsed.workouts?.length || 0} 条<br><br> 请把下方的完整数据复制给助手！ </div> `; document.getElementById('dataArea').select(); document.execCommand('copy'); alert('✅ 数据已自动复制到剪贴板！请粘贴给助手。'); } else { document.getElementById('status').innerHTML = ` <div style="color: #ef4444;"> ❌ 未找到数据！<br><br> 请确保：<br> 1. 这是您添加了数据的浏览器<br> 2. 您访问的是正确的域名（localhost）<br> 3. 您已经在应用中添加了数据 </div> `; } } catch (e) { document.getElementById('status').innerHTML = ` <div style="color: #ef4444;"> ❌ 错误: ${e.message} </div> `; } }); </script> </body> </html>
